verdict.classification: focused repair audit, not the mandatory post-implementation heavy exact-head re-review
notes: Quota accounting deliberately favors false blocking over quota overflow.
A permanently stuck SDK worker remains daemonized until process exit while training and shutdown stay bounded.

validation.ruff_command: uv run ruff check src/training/wandb_tracking.py src/runtime/config.py tests/test_wandb_tracking.py tests/test_config_profiles.py
validation.format_command: uv run ruff format --check src/training/wandb_tracking.py src/runtime/config.py tests/test_wandb_tracking.py tests/test_config_profiles.py
validation.diff_check: git diff --check exited 0 with no output
